text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In my formative years, I lacked the "will" that my peers exhibited. I
simply took instructions and carried them out.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Everything changed when I encountered the G1 races. For the first
time in my existence, I felt what it was like to "yearn" for something.

text_block_list.name: Young Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Father... I... I want to be a Triple Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text: ...You—I... I see. Their running style caught your eye, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My father is a stoic man, but on that day I vividly remember observing
a smile.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text: Let's do it, Bourbon. For the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That goal was one of the few choices I've ever made that truly
reflected my "will." My dad and I treasured it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...This concludes the memory log. I trust that sharing this information
with you will aid in your comprehension of me.

It's been a few days since I've become Mihono Bourbon's trainer.
During our downtime, she shares bits and pieces of her past with me.

Her story continues to inspire me—a cyborg-like girl with hopes and
dreams hidden under her mechanical facade.
choice_data_list: Together, let's make your dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Certainly.
The corners of the trainee's lips move upwards into a small smile.

Slowly but surely, we continue to make progress. But as word of our
training gets out, people begin to approach me with remarks of
disappointment.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
What?! Mihono Bourbon's training for long distances? That's such a
waste though! She should just stick with sprinting!

Letting the comments fall on deaf ears, we march on and continue
training for the Triple Crown. The skepticism only strengthens our
resolve to prove everyone wrong.
Mihono Bourbon is going to show the world what she's made of.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your recommendation is... the Tracen Meet's 2,000-meter turf race?
The distance is comparable to the longest junior G1 race, the Hopeful
Stakes.

The Tracen Meet—a highly anticipated school event with numerous
races. The fierce competition attracts countless spectators.
choice_data_list: That's right! We're taking first place!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Processing new directive.
And with that, our preparations for the meet begin.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(1,600 meters completed. 400 meters remaining. Heart rate and
oxygen intake are within optimal parameters.)
choice_data_list:
Come on, let's beat your best time! You got
this!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Roger that!

Gritting her teeth, Mihono Bourbon bolts across the track like the
wind.

The day of the Tracen Meet arrives. Throngs of people gather, eager
to catch a glimpse of one student—Mihono Bourbon.

Ever since the news of her switch to long races broke out, the racer
has become a hot topic.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I can't imagine her running 2,000 meters—she doesn't have the
stamina for it!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
This race will be tough to watch. Honestly, what on earth is her trainer
thinking?

Praying for Mihono Bourbon's success, I fix my eyes on the starting
gates.
Bang!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaaand we're off! Who will take first place in today's 2,000-meter
turf race?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(Acquired favorable position. Preparing to accelerate. All systems
functioning at maximum efficiency.)

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...How the heck is Mihono Bourbon keeping up with everyone?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon takes the lead! Rounding the 4th corner, she's on
fire—but wait! The other runners are closing in fast on her as we
approach the last stretch!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: This is it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon has lost her lead! With just one-hundred meters
remaining, will she catch up in time?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(One racer ahead, two close behind. Stamina reserves are rapidly
depleting. Detecting lung distress. Concentration faltering. But I...)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Must win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Four Umamusume are fighting tooth and nail for the lead as they
approach the end! Who will take first?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

The crowd is on the edge of their seats as the racers charge across
the finish line. Everyone holds their breath, waiting for the caster to
announce the results.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The winner is—MIHONO BOURBON! MIHONO BOURBON!

Amazed, the once-skeptical trainers now look at her with wonder and
incredulity.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Who knew she could run 2,000 meters like that? I'm taking my words
back about Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Looks like we've got a new contender for medium events now!

Today, Mihono Bourbon has made a name for herself as a formidable
Triple Crown challenger.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Placing first in a 2,000-meter race with such little stamina... Well, I'll
be damned.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: You really are one heck of a runner, Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mission accomplished. As per our agreement, I have emerged
victorious in the 2,000-meter turf race.

Mihono Bourbon joins me in the stands, exuding her usual
calm-and-collected demeanor despite the taxing race.
That today's results were the culmination of grit and perseverance.

In the end, hard work surpasses talent—there's no doubt about it. I
open my mouth to remind her, only to find myself choking back a sob.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've detected a shift in your emotional state as characterized by
erratic breathing and facial muscle contortions. However, the cause is
unknown.
choice_data_list:
The way you run inspires courage in others... I'm
so proud of you.

The way you run inspires courage in others... I'm
so proud of you.

text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I want her to continue to prove that hard work surpasses
talent. Her usually robotic eyes widen slightly in response.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I ran only to achieve my goal. Evoking an "emotional" response is not
currently logged as one of my objectives.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However... given the source of the comment, I will take it into
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have updated my objectives. They now include the Twinkle Series,
the Classic Triple Crown, and showing the value of hard work.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My calculations show that there will be challenges ahead of us, but
none too hard to overcome with your presence.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Once again, I look forward to continue working with you,
Fathe—Trainer.

For a moment, the racer's stoic expression crumbles as her cheeks
redden. Although it's just a verbal slip, I can't help but feel that we're
getting closer.
